task_name.description: The audio task conducted for the recording.

proportion_clipped_metric.description: Proportion of audio samples at the clipping threshold.

proportion_silent_metric.description: Proportion of audio frames classified as silent.

peak_snr_from_spectral_metric.description: Peak signal-to-noise ratio estimated from spectral analysis, in dB.

spectral_gating_snr_metric.description: Signal-to-noise ratio estimated using spectral gating, in dB.

amplitude_modulation_depth_metric.description: Depth of amplitude modulation in the audio signal.

high_proportion_clipped_check.description: True if the audio has a high proportion of clipped samples.

completely_silent_check.description: True if the audio is completely silent.

very_low_peak_snr_from_spectral_check.description: True if the peak spectral SNR is very low, indicating poor recording quality.

low_spectral_gating_snr_check.description: True if the spectral gating SNR is low, indicating significant background noise.

very_low_amplitude_modulation_depth_chec.description: True if the amplitude modulation depth is very low, suggesting a flat or non-speech signal.
